name: Vivani Medical, Inc.
business: Vivani Medical, Inc. is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company that develops miniature, ultra long-acting subdermal drug implant candidates utilizing its proprietary NanoPortal technology for the treatment of chronic diseases. Its lead program, NPM-139, is a six-month GLP-1 (semaglutide) implant for chronic weight management, and the company also develops implants for type 2 diabetes (NPM-133), chronic weight management (NPM-115), and veterinary use (OKV-119). The company's technology aims to address medication non-adherence and drug tolerability challenges.
sellsTo: companion animals (cats and dogs) via veterinary partner

exposures.sentence: Vivani Medical, Inc. ( Vivani, the Company, we, us, our or similar terms) is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company which develops miniature, ultra long-acting subdermal drug implant candidates utilizing its proprietary NanoPortal technology, which is designed to enable reversible, ultra long-acting, near constant-rate delivery of a broad range of medicines to treat chronic diseases.

Vivani Medical, Inc. ( Vivani, the Company, we, us, our or similar terms) is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company which develops miniature, ultra long-acting subdermal drug implant candidates utilizing its proprietary NanoPortal technology, which is designed to enable reversible, ultra long-acting, near constant-rate delivery of a broad range of medicines to treat chronic diseases.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical study for NPM-139 (semaglutide implant) in mid-2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company currently expects the Phase 1 study to initiate in mid- 2026 .

catalysts.event: Completion of LIBERATE-1 first-in-human clinical trial for NPM-115 (exenatide implant) and top-line data release in August 2025
catalysts.sentence: On August 5, 2025, Vivani announced plans to support the rapid advancement of NPM- 139 , a novel semaglutide implant, based on promising results from the LIBERATE- 1 clinical study and additional positive data from a preclinical study with a semaglutide implant.

catalysts.event: Potential spin-off of Cortigent via Form 10 or IPO
catalysts.sentence: Currently, both a spin-off to be registered on a Form 10 and an IPO to be registered on a Form S- 1 registration statement are approaches being considered to transition Cortigent to becoming a separate reporting company that may provide an opportunity for Vivani's stockholders to potentially realize value in Cortigent s assets.

tamClaims.claim: Semaglutide based products generated combined 2025 sales of over $34 billion. Total 2025 GLP-1 product sales in the obesity segment were approximately $26 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Semaglutide based products generated combined 2025 sales of over $34 billion. Total 2025 GLP-1 product sales in the obesity segment were approximately $26 billion.

tamClaims.claim: In 2025 , global sales of GLP- 1 receptor agonists products (all indications) were over $ 72 billion and are projected to reach over $ 160 billion per year by 2034 .
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025 , global sales of GLP- 1 receptor agonists products (all indications) were over $ 72 billion and are projected to reach over $ 160 billion per year by 2034 .

tamClaims.claim: According to the CDC, more than 37 million Americans have diabetes, and 90 - 95 % of those individuals have type 2 diabetes. The total number of people living worldwide with diabetes today is 537 million. This number is projected to rise to 643 million by 2030 and 783 million by 2045 .

The total number of people living worldwide with diabetes today is 537 million. This number is projected to rise to 643 million by 2030 and 783 million by 2045 .

tamClaims.claim: Obesity is a global epidemic affecting over 1 billion adults and children globally.
tamClaims.sentence: Obesity is a global epidemic affecting over 1 billion adults and children globally.
